form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. 3rd (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 4 m by Brady To Gronk (1:58.20) in NW1500L4 on March 25 at $14. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into fourth behind Barley Mischievous at this track over 1609m in a NW1500L4 on March 18 at $53.40. Hard to envisage a win.
